name: pixiewps
title: pixiewps
description:
Offline WPS bruteforce tool
Pixiewps is a tool written in C used to bruteforce offline the WPS pin
exploiting the low or non-existing entropy of some APs (pixie dust attack).
It is meant for educational purposes only.

commands.name: pixiewps
commands.description: Offline Wi-Fi Protected Setup bruteforce tool

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use pixiewps because Offline WPS bruteforce tool.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use pixiewps as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pixiewps <arguments>` as documented upstream for pixiewps.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pixiewps -e <pke> -s <e-hash1> -z <e-hash2> -a <authkey> -n <e-nonce> -S` as documented upstream for pixiewps.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pixiewps -e <pke> -s <e-hash1> -z <e-hash2> -S -n <e-nonce> -m <r-nonce> -b <e-bssid>` as documented upstream for pixiewps.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `pixiewps -e <pke> -r <pkr> -n <e-nonce> -m <r-nonce> -b <e-bssid> -7 <enc7> --mode 3` as documented upstream for pixiewps.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair pixiewps with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `pixiewps --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: pixiewps - Offline Wi-Fi Protected Setup bruteforce tool
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install pixiewps. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `pixiewps <arguments>`. Further invocations from upstream: `pixiewps -e <pke> -s <e-hash1> -z <e-hash2> -a <authkey> -n <e-nonce> -S`; `pixiewps -e <pke> -s <e-hash1> -z <e-hash2> -S -n <e-nonce> -m <r-nonce> -b <e-bssid>`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Offline WPS bruteforce tool.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: pixiewps - Offline Wi-Fi Protected Setup bruteforce tool.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install pixiewps
Install with: sudo apt install pixiewps
